text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Everything in the old science room we share... is
glowing a weird color. That includes your research
equipment... and everyone in my collection.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only one who uses that space...
Please be careful...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is an unfortunate side effect of my latest
experiment, but I assure you it was a complete
accident. Even I was not expecting that outcome.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Everything will be back to normal within an hour,
so there's no need to worry. However...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I gained some very valuable insight from that
experiment. And thus, I would like to perform it
again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to look at me like that... Oh, fine.
I suppose I'll abandon the experiment for now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As an apology, why don't I make you a cup of
your favorite drink?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A coffee... from you, a tea drinker?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, of course. I have Darjeeling, Assam, and
Earl Grey. Which can I get for you?
